title: React hook for fetching, filtering, and sorting topic lists with mock data
purpose: Provides a React hook that manages a list of topics with filtering, sorting, and loading states using mock data.
module_context: Exports a useTopics hook that manages topic data with filtering, sorting, and loading states. Includes mock data for topics and helper functions for filtering and sorting.

steps.content: Check if the last verified date is null or undefined.
IF the last verified date is null, return true indicating the topic is stale.
Calculate the stale date by subtracting the stale days from the current date.
Compare the verified date with the stale date to determine if the topic is stale.
If no filters are provided, return the original list of topics.
Filter topics based on confidence levels if specified in filters.
Filter topics based on whether they have open flags if specified in filters.
Filter topics based on whether they have drafts if specified in filters.
Filter topics based on staleness if specified in filters.
Return the filtered list of topics that match all specified criteria.

methods.name: sortTopics
methods.normalized_params: (topics: TopicSummary[], sortBy: TopicSortBy, sortOrder: SortOrder): TopicSummary[]

steps.content: Create a copy of the topics array to avoid mutating the original.
Sort the topics based on the specified sort field and order.
For name sorting, compare topic names using locale comparison.
For confidence sorting, use a predefined confidence order to compare.
For last verified sorting, convert dates to timestamps for comparison.
For access count sorting, compare numeric access counts directly.
Reverse the sort order if descending is specified.

methods.name: useTopics
methods.normalized_params: (filters?: TopicFilters, sortBy?: TopicSortBy, sortOrder?: SortOrder): UseTopicsReturn

steps.content: Initialize state for topics, loading status, and error.
Define a callback function to fetch topics with simulated API delay.
Apply filters and sorting to the mock topic data during fetch.
Set the fetched and processed topics to state.
Handle errors during the fetch operation.
Set loading state to false after fetch completes.
Use effect to call fetch topics on component mount and when dependencies change.
Return the topics list, loading state, error, and refresh function.
Set the loading state to true before starting the fetch.
Clear any existing error state before starting the fetch.
Simulate an API delay using a timeout.
Apply the filters to the mock topics data.
Apply the sorting to the filtered topics.
Update the topics state with the filtered and sorted results.
IF the fetch fails, set the error state with the error details.
Set the loading state to false after the fetch completes.
Call the fetch topics function to refresh the topic list.
